mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(MIN(DataDate), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:00') AS DataDate, MIN(Data1) AS Data1, MIN(Data2) AS Data2, MIN(Data3) AS Data3, MIN(Data4) AS Data4, MIN(Data5) AS Data5, MIN(Data6) AS Data6, MIN(Data7) AS Data7, MIN(Data8) AS Data8, MIN(Data9) AS Data9, MIN(Data10) AS Data10, MIN(Data11) AS Data11, MIN(Data12) AS Data12, MIN(Data13) AS Data13, MIN(Data14) AS Data14, MIN(Data15) AS Data15, MIN(Data16) AS Data16 FROM ${tableName} WHERE DataDate BETWEEN #{from} AND #{to} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(DataDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') ORDER BY DataDate ASC
